def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    aroon_window = params.get('aroon_window', 14)
    atr_window = params.get('atr_window', 20)
    breakout_multiplier = params.get('breakout_multiplier', 1.5)
    
    aroon_up = ta.trend.aroon_up(df['high'], df['low'], window=aroon_window)
    aroon_down = ta.trend.aroon_down(df['high'], df['low'], window=aroon_window)
    atr = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window)
    
    # Strong uptrend condition (aroon up > 70) with close above upper breakout
    upper_breakout = df['close'] > (df['close'].shift(1) + breakout_multiplier * atr)
    long_entry = (aroon_up > 70) & upper_breakout
    
    # Strong downtrend condition (aroon down > 70) with close below lower breakout
    lower_breakout = df['close'] < (df['close'].shift(1) - breakout_multiplier * atr)
    short_entry = (aroon_down > 70) & lower_breakout
    
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[long_entry] = 1
    signals[short_entry] = -1
    
    return signals.fillna(0).astype(int)
rationale: Combines Aroon trend strength indicator with ATR-based breakout levels to capture GBP/USD momentum continuations after confirmed trends.
